en_title: Nintendo Slashes Price on Tears of the Kingdom's Switch 2 Edition for the First Time
cn_title: 任天堂首次下调《塞尔达传说：王国之泪》Switch 2版价格
subtitle: 无需会员，首次降价
opus_summary: 任天堂在亚马逊Prime会员日首次下调《王国之泪》Switch 2版价格，降20美元(约合人民币136元)(约136元)至59.88美元(约合人民币406元)。

paragraphs.en: If you've been waiting for the right moment to pick up The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom , this might be it. Amazon Prime Day is officially live from June 23 to June 26, but one of the best deals at Amazon is already live, and you don't even need a Prime membership to grab it.
paragraphs.cn: 如果你一直在等待购买《塞尔达传说：王国之泪》的最佳时机，现在可能就是时候了。亚马逊Prime会员日将于6月23日至26日正式开启，但其中一项最划算的交易已经先行上线，而且你甚至不需要Prime会员就能购买。

paragraphs.en: Nintendo rarely discounts its biggest games, even years after release, which makes this one stand out. Right now, both the original Nintendo Switch version and the enhanced Switch 2 Edition are down to some of their best prices in a long time at Amazon, with each version seeing a sizable $20 discount (for both digital and physical copies).
paragraphs.cn: 任天堂很少对大作打折，即使发售多年后也是如此，这让这次折扣格外引人注目。目前，原版Switch版本和增强版Switch 2版在亚马逊上均降至了许久以来的最低价，每个版本都享有20美元(约合人民币136元)的折扣（数字版和实体版均适用）。

paragraphs.en: Switch 2 owners, if you want the simplest option, the Switch 2 Edition costs $59.88 and includes all of the enhancements out of the box. Compared to the original $80 price tag we saw over the console's launch this time last year, that's a lot easier to stomach.
paragraphs.cn: Switch 2玩家如果选择最省心的方案，Switch 2版售价59.88美元(约合人民币406元)，开箱即含全部增强内容。相比去年此时该主机发售时我们看到的80美元(约合人民币542元)原价，这个价格要容易接受得多。

paragraphs.en: Yet, if you're a Nintendo Switch Online member, it's also worth remembering that you can upgrade your OG Switch copies to Switch 2 Editions at no extra cost. So, you could pick up Tears of the Kingdom for even less, at $49.94 , and still play the enhanced Switch 2 version (just add to cart to see the price).
paragraphs.cn: 然而，如果你是任天堂Switch Online会员，也别忘了你可以免费将你的初代Switch版游戏升级为Switch 2版。因此，你可以以更低的价格——49.94美元(约合人民币339元)——入手《王国之泪》，然后照样玩到增强后的Switch 2版（加入购物车即可看到价格）。

paragraphs.en: If you can check Tears out on the latest hardware, I'd highly recommend it. The Switch 2 Edition brings several welcome upgrades to an already exceptional adventure. That includes improved visuals, a higher and more stable frame rate, faster load times, and HDR support.
paragraphs.cn: 如果你能在最新硬件上体验《王国之泪》，我强烈推荐。Switch 2版为这部本就出色的冒险带来了多项受欢迎的升级，包括改进后的画质、更高更稳定的帧率、更快的加载时间以及对HDR的支持。

paragraphs.en: It's also genuinely surprising to see Tears of the Kingdom discounted at all. Like I mentioned, Nintendo's first-party games have a reputation for sticking close to full price for years, which makes deals like this feel like quite the rarity.
paragraphs.cn: 看到《王国之泪》打折也着实令人惊讶。正如我所说，任天堂第一方游戏以多年维持全价著称，这让这种折扣显得弥足珍贵。

paragraphs.en: The timing is especially notable given that the massive open world game skipped last year's Black Friday sales entirely. In fact, this Prime Day promotion marks the first major official discount we've seen on Tears since Black Friday 2024 .
paragraphs.cn: 这一时机格外值得注意，因为这款庞大的开放世界游戏去年完全缺席了黑色星期五促销。事实上，本次Prime会员日促销是《王国之泪》自2024年黑色星期五以来我们见到的首次重大官方折扣。

paragraphs.en: Unfortuntely, anyone who picked it up back then scored a much better bargain, with the game briefly dropping to just $29.99. So, as good as this Prime Day offer is, neither Amazon nor Nintendo seems quite as willing to cut prices that aggressively in 2026. Still, a $20 discount on one of Nintendo's best games ever is nothing to scoff at.
paragraphs.cn: 不幸的是，当时入手的人捡到了更超值的便宜，游戏一度仅售29.99美元(约合人民币203元)。因此，尽管这次Prime会员日优惠很不错，但2026年亚马逊和任天堂似乎都没那么愿意大幅降价了。不过，作为任天堂史上最优秀的游戏之一，能优惠20美元(约合人民币136元)还是值得肯定的。

paragraphs.en: In his review for IGN , Tom Marks awarded The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom a rare "Masterpiece" 10/10, calling it "an unfathomable follow-up to one of the greatest games ever made, somehow improving upon it in nearly every way, be that with simple quality-of-life improvements, a genuinely exciting story, or wildly creative new building mechanics that make you rethink what is possible."
paragraphs.cn: Tom Marks在为IGN撰写的评测中，给了《塞尔达传说：王国之泪》罕见的「杰作」10/10满分，称其为「对史上最伟大游戏之一的深不可测的续作，几乎在各个方面都有改进，无论是简单的品质提升、一个真正激动人心的故事，还是让你重新思考可能性的极具创意的新建造机制。」

paragraphs.en: Marks was just as enthusiastic when revisiting the game on Nintendo's latest hardware, writing : "Not only does The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom still hold up as a game I can't wait to lose a few dozen more hours in, the updates and additions made to the Switch 2 Edition make it feel like this is the way it was always meant to be played."
paragraphs.cn: Marks在任天堂最新硬件上重玩这款游戏时同样充满热情，他写道：「《塞尔达传说：王国之泪》不仅依然是一款让我迫不及待想再投入几十个小时的游戏，Switch 2版的更新和新增内容更让人觉得，这才是它从一开始就该有的游玩方式。」

paragraphs.en: There's plenty more to check out in the Amazon Prime Day sale, by the way. If you've not already got yourself a Prime membership, then it may be worth at least picking up a 30-day free trial to access deals like these over the next few days. Otherwise, you can also keep an eye out for retailers price matching Amazon offers. I'd suggest comparing prices at Best Buy, Walmart, and Target.
paragraphs.cn: 顺便一提，亚马逊Prime会员日促销中还有大量商品可逛。如果你还没有Prime会员，至少可以领取30天免费试用，以便在未来几天获取此类优惠。否则，也可以留意那些与亚马逊比价的零售商。我建议对比一下Best Buy、沃尔玛和Target的价格。

paragraphs.en: If you haven't already got a Switch 2 as well, I'd also recommend checking out the "Switch 2: Choose Your Own Game Bundle" which is the best offer you can find on the console right now. It's especially notable considering the console's $50 price hike incoming in September this year.
paragraphs.cn: 如果你还没入手Switch 2，我也建议看看「Switch 2：自选游戏同捆装」，这是目前你能找到的该主机最划算的优惠。尤其考虑到该主机今年9月将涨价50美元(约合人民币339元)，这一点尤其值得关注。

paragraphs.en: Most Switch 2 game preorders are also $10 off at Amazon right now as well , which is a mighty good deal whichever way you look at it. That includes Star Fox (which is out this week), Switch Sports Resort, the new Fire Emblem, and plenty more as well.
paragraphs.cn: 此外，目前亚马逊上大多数Switch 2游戏的预购也都优惠10美元(约合人民币68元)，无论怎么看都非常划算。其中就包括《星际火狐》（本周发售）、《Switch运动 度假胜地》、新《火焰纹章》等多款游戏。

paragraphs.en: You don't have to pay for the game until it ships either (per Amazon standard preorder policy), unlike buying digitally, where you have to cough up the cash right away. So, feel free to preorder and lock in that low price, and simply cancel later on if you change your mind.
paragraphs.cn: 而且根据亚马逊标准预购政策，你不需要在发货前付款，不像数字版购买那样需要马上掏钱。所以尽管预购锁定低价，之后改变主意了也可以直接取消。

paragraphs.en: Robert Anderson is IGN's Senior Commerce Editor and resident deals expert on games, collectibles, trading card games, and more. You can follow him .
paragraphs.cn: Robert Anderson是IGN高级商务编辑，也是游戏、收藏品、集换式卡牌等领域的常驻优惠专家。你可以关注他。
